channel.title: Planetterrian Daily — Blog
channel.description: Blog posts from Planetterrian Daily podcast episodes. Daily science, longevity, and health discoveries.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Engineered probiotic bacteria infiltrated tumors in mice and produced cancer drugs on site, potentially improving precision while cutting side effects.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: South African raptors have declined sharply over 16 years, with half the studied species dropping more than 50%.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Ravens in Yellowstone navigate directly to likely wolf kill sites using memorized landscape patterns rather than following the predators.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Scientists uncovered evidence of ancient underground water on Mars that may have sustained microbial life longer than expected.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Researchers found that combining two colon polyp types raises bowel cancer risk up to fivefold.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: European trial finds sulthiame drug cuts sleep apnea breathing pauses by up to 47%, improving oxygen levels.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Mayo Clinic identified a rare MET gene mutation directly causing fatty liver disease without common risk factors.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Phase 1 trial uses base editing to safely lower LDL cholesterol in familial hypercholesterolemia patients.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: A massive cellular atlas of 7 million cells shows aging begins earlier and coordinates across 21 organs.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Infusing stem cells from young donors reduced frailty in older people, boosting their strength and mobility.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Shingles vaccine may slow biological aging and reduce inflammation.
